e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The Windows fkwu HTTP slice now has a higher grammar class/template wrapper proof without widening the minimal socket runtime path. Request and response socket bands remain fkwu-stable and runtime-toolchain-free.
public_endpoints: local-only: Form stdlib and Windows fkwu verifier; no public HTTP endpoint changed
test_flows: Generic grammar proof: HttpExchange<TRequest,TResponse> and PlainSocketHttpExchange validate through http-client-render to verdict 2047 on Go, Rust, TypeScript, and fkwu.
Runtime request proof: verify_windows_fkwu_http_verbs_socket emits and runs fkwu against http-client-socket-verbs, returns verdict 127, and shows nonzero socket tag counters.
Runtime response proof: verify_windows_fkwu_http_response_socket emits and runs fkwu against http-client-socket-response, returns verdict 8191, and shows nonzero socket tag counters.
Runtime isolation proof: the fkwu verifiers execute with PATH restricted to C:\WINDOWS\System32;C:\WINDOWS and confirm Go, clang, and llvm-objdump are absent.
